title: Attention Is All You Need
description: The fundamental shift toward transformer architectures. Essential for understanding how we scaled intelligence to the modern era.

title: Deep Residual Learning
description: A masterclass in overcoming the vanishing gradient problem. ResNet paved the way for deeper, high-velocity neural networks.

title: Spanner: Google's DB
